task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo discussion dashboard or main app menu is visible, indicating the 'admin' user has successfully logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Calendar application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible, showing a daily, weekly, or monthly calendar grid with the word 'Calendar' in the top-left header.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Alice Johnson' is selected in the Attendees filter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right sidebar under the 'Attendees' section, 'Alice Johnson' is listed and has a checked box or active toggle next to her name.

task_completion.description: Verify other attendees are deselected so ONLY Alice Johnson's events are shown.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right sidebar under the 'Attendees' section, other users (such as 'Everybody' or the default 'Mitchell Admin'/'admin') are unchecked or removed from the active filter list.

task_completion.description: Verify the calendar grid displays the correct filtered events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar grid shows events specific to Alice Johnson, such as 'Q2 Financial Review', 'Team Standup', or 'Marketing Campaign Review'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window (like Chrome or Firefox) is visible with 'localhost:8069' in the address bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Odoo 17 UI elements (purple header, standard sidebar, calendar grid) are present, rather than a text editor or terminal output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the UI does not look artificially modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo 17 is running on http://localhost:8069. The Calendar app has an 'Attendees' filter located in the right sidebar. Alice Johnson is a valid contact in the system. When properly filtered to ONLY Alice Johnson, the calendar should display her specific events, which include 'Weekly Team Kickoff', 'Product Strategy Review', 'Q2 Financial Review', 'Team Standup', 'Marketing Campaign Review', 'Product Roadmap Planning', 'Investor Update Preparation', 'Quarterly Business Review', and 'All-Hands Meeting'.
